intent: Personalization, Content Expansion, and Functional Completion.
objective: Enhance user experience through personalized settings, an expanded problem set, and convenient platform features.
decisions: Extend the users table and User model for personalized settings (theme, font, language).
Add a 'notes' table for user-specific problem annotations.
Implement a robust problem search/filter system in the backend.
Expand SHARED_PROBLEMS in problemCatalog.js with new high-quality problems.
risks: Schema changes to the users table without proper migration support (handle gracefully).
Performance impact on problem search with a larger dataset (use efficient SQL/indexing).
